## Summary

-

## Type

- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Translation/copy
- [ ] Personal-data recipe

## Checks

- [ ] Commits are signed off with DCO (`git commit -s` / `Signed-off-by:`).
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, production exports, or private user data are included.
- [ ] Personal-data examples use only owned-data, demo data, or mocked responses.
- [ ] Required scopes and privacy notes are documented when the PR touches personal-data recipes.
- [ ] Creator Showcase entries document the shareable result type and safe default visibility.
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Docs/translations updated where needed.

## Notes

Security-sensitive details should not be discussed in public PR text. Use the process in `SECURITY.md`.
